description: MeranO appears to be a service associated with the Merano tourism ecosystem. The public `merano.eu` site is a consumer-facing web presence, while `app.merano.eu` exposes an MCP endpoint for AI-agent integration.
summary: MeranO exposes a public MCP server at `https://app.merano.eu/mcp`; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surfaces were found for `merano.eu`.
